creator: jeffrey_in_nyc
caption: Would you visit this stunning Philippines Beach Resort?🇵🇭🏝️ #travel #philippines #beach #vacation #resort

transcription.text: This might be the most beautiful resort I've ever stayed in, but the price was the part that actually shocked me. You'll be escorted by boat to the resort, and upon arrival, of course you'll be handed a refreshing cocktail which you can enjoy on the resort's private beach with palm trees, stunning clear blue waters, personal cabanas, and an infinity pool that overlooks the water. But it gets even better because it also has two giant rooftop pools, three restaurants with delicious food and the freshest fruit, several bars, and it even looks like this at night. Included in your stay, you'll get a fully loaded breakfast buffet with all sorts of Asian and Western cuisine, and each room comes standard with a private balcony that overlooks the resort. There's also so much to do near the resort too. You can go diving off of waterfalls with water so clean you can drink it, visit a bat cave that has 2 million bats, go cliff diving, ride jet skis, go island hopping, and even step out onto a real true vanishing island. With two people, you can expect to pay $90 per night per person, and the resort is called Discovery in Samoa Island, Philippines.
